items.summary_en: Kimi is reportedly planning an IPO, putting pressure on rival Zhipu. Hong Kong's scarce AI model listings could shift with Kimi's potential IPO, though not yet confirmed.
items.why_zh: Kimi若成功IPO，将改变港股大模型稀缺格局，并加剧国内AI竞争。
items.why_en: A successful Kimi IPO would reshape Hong Kong's AI landscape and intensify domestic AI competition.

items.title_zh: 阿里千问发布 Qwen-Image-3.0
items.title_en: Alibaba's Qwen Releases Qwen-Image-3.0 Image Generation Model
items.summary_zh: 36氪获悉，阿里千问大模型正式推出Qwen-Image-3.0，Qwen-Image 系列的第三代图像生成基础模型。新模型支持最大4.5k token输入，支持10px小字精准渲染，支持12国语言原生渲染。
items.summary_en: Alibaba's Qwen launched Qwen-Image-3.0, the third-generation image generation model, supporting up to 4.5k token input, precise 10px small text rendering, and native rendering in 12 languages.
items.why_zh: Qwen-Image-3.0 的多语言和小字渲染能力增强了阿里在 AI 图像生成领域的竞争力，尤其适用于需要精确文本的图像场景。
items.why_en: Qwen-Image-3.0's multilingual and small-text rendering capabilities strengthen Alibaba's position in AI image generation, especially for text-heavy image tasks.

items.title_zh: 国产开源大模型Kimi K3到底强在哪？何时向新用户开放？
items.title_en: What Makes Open-Source Kimi K3 Strong? When Will It Open to New Users?
items.summary_zh: 国产开源大模型Kimi K3到底强在哪？何时向新用户开放？ 搜狐网
items.summary_en: The article discusses the strengths of the open-source Kimi K3 model, but details are not provided in the summary. The timeline for new user access remains unclear.
items.why_zh: Kimi K3 作为国产开源大模型，其性能和开放策略对 AI 社区和开发者生态有重要影响。
items.why_en: As a domestic open-source large model, Kimi K3's performance and openness strategy significantly impact the AI community and developer ecosystem.

items.title_zh: 月之暗面，即将上线Kimi Hosted Agent平台
items.title_en: Moonshot AI to Launch Kimi Hosted Agent Platform
items.summary_zh: 月之暗面，即将上线Kimi Hosted Agent平台 电子工程专辑
items.summary_en: Moonshot AI announced the upcoming launch of Kimi Hosted Agent platform, a managed AI agent service for developers. The platform will integrate Moonshot's proprietary LLM to enable automated tasks and intelligent conversations, potentially lowering barriers to AI application development.
items.why_zh: Kimi Hosted Agent平台将AI代理能力以托管服务形式开放，可能加速智能代理在商业场景的普及。
items.why_en: Kimi Hosted Agent platform opens AI agent capabilities as a managed service, potentially accelerating the adoption of intelligent agents in commercial scenarios.

items.title_zh: 月之暗面：B 端收入七成来自 API 调用，已形成可持续的正向循环
items.title_en: Moonshot AI to Launch Kimi Hosted Agent Platform, API Revenue Accounts for 70% of B2B Income
items.summary_zh: IT之家 7 月 21 日消息，据《科创板日报》报道，今日，月之暗面（Moonshot AI）B 端企业业务负责人黄震昕透露，公司即将上线 Kimi Hosted Agent 平台，面向 ToB 客户开放沙箱与 Harness 能力，打造标准化的企业级能力输出接口。 据介绍，该平台提供 PPT 生成、投研系统搭建等标准化 API，支持客户自定义输出风格，可直接嵌入企业内部办公系统使用。 黄震昕还表示，当前 B 端收入中，API 调用业务占比达到 70%，整体商业化路径清晰，已形成可持续的正向循环。 月之暗面于 7 月 16 日上线推出 Kimi K3 模型，是 Kimi 迄今能力最强的模型，拥有 2.8 万亿参数，100 万 Tokens 上下文，主要面向长程编程与端到端知识工作。 IT之家注意到，月之暗面 Kimi 于 7 月 19 日发布公告，为了保障已有订阅用户的体验，决定即日起，暂停 C 端新用户订阅，将已有算力全部投入于服务已订阅用户，保障已订阅用户的全部权益不受影响。
items.summary_en: Moonshot AI announced the upcoming launch of Kimi Hosted Agent platform for enterprise clients, offering standardized APIs for PPT generation and investment research. API calls account for 70% of B2B revenue, forming a sustainable positive cycle. The company also released the Kimi K3 model with 2.8 trillion parameters and paused new consumer subscriptions to prioritize existing users.
items.why_zh: 月之暗面通过B端API实现高收入占比，并推出更强模型，展示了其商业化路径的可持续性。
items.why_en: Moonshot AI's high B2B API revenue share and new model launch demonstrate a sustainable commercialization path.

items.title_zh: YouTube 明确打击 AI 垃圾内容，三类视频将不能变现
items.title_en: YouTube Updates Policy, Three Types of AI Slop Content Ineligible for Monetization
items.summary_zh: IT之家 7 月 21 日消息，据科技媒体 TechCrunch 昨天报道，YouTube 已经于 7 月 16 日更新平台政策，进一步打击 AI 垃圾（AI Slop）内容。最新政策明确指出， “非真实内容”大类下的三种视频将无法变现 。 据报道，YouTube 已在此前针对 AI 内容制定相关政策。本次更新并非推出全新规则， 而是在现有政策基础上进行细化区分 。 全新“非真实内容”将细分为三大类：第一类是通用、重复的模板化内容；第二类是令人反感或令人痛苦的内容；第三类则是使用 AI 虚拟人物讨论健康、金融等敏感话题的内容。 在官方的定义下，重复类内容是借助 AI、计算机生成图像（IT之家注：CG）制作的模板化作品。部分教程类视频如果只是重复表述平台已有内容、没有提供原创内容，则可能一并受到影响。 而“令人反感”的内容则被定义为 故意制造痛苦 、 恐惧或操纵观众情绪 ，以获得更多点击量的视频。例如某些视频会刻意展示动物陷入困境，然后等待人类救援。 第三类内容则是针对滥用 AI 虚拟人物， 官方不鼓励创作者使用 AI 虚拟形象讨论金融 、 法律 、 医疗健康等敏感话题 。 新规规定，如果有频道发布大量上述内容，则无法加入 YouTube 合作伙伴计划（YouTube Partner Program，YPP），失去变现资格。
items.summary_en: YouTube updated its policy on July 16, specifying three categories of AI-generated content that cannot be monetized: generic templated content, distressing content, and AI avatars discussing sensitive topics. The update refines existing rules to combat low-quality AI slop.
items.why_zh: YouTube明确打击AI垃圾内容，保护平台内容质量和创作者权益。
items.why_en: YouTube's policy update targets AI slop to maintain content quality and protect creator interests.

items.title_zh: 特斯拉重启 HW3 车型 FSD v14 Lite 推送，新增多项功能缩小与新款车型差距
items.title_en: Tesla Resumes FSD v14 Lite Rollout for HW3 Vehicles, Adds Features to Narrow Gap with HW4
items.summary_zh: IT之家 7 月 21 日消息，特斯拉重新启动了面向 HW3（Hardware 3）车型的 FSD v14 Lite 推送，并带来了新的软件版本 2026.20.6.10。这一更新加入了大量来自 FSD v14 正式分支的新功能，使 FSD v14 Lite 的体验更加接近完整版 FSD v14。 虽然软件仍然被命名为 FSD v14 Lite，但此次更新加入了不少新功能。 上个月底首次推出 FSD v14 Lite 时，除了“v14 Lite”这一名称外，并没有更具体的版本号，这也让不少人认为，特斯拉不会像正式版 FSD 那样持续推出小版本更新。 不过事实证明，FSD v14 Lite 现在就迎来了一次重要更新。 FSD v14 Lite 是 FSD v14 的精简版（Distilled Model），而 FSD v14 本身又是 Cybercab 自动驾驶软件的精简版本。其目标是在老款 HW3 车型上尽可能提供与 HW4 相同的 FSD 功能，在未来特斯拉推出硬件升级方案之前，缩小 HW3 与 HW4 在自动驾驶能力上的差距。 FSD v14 Lite 首个版本此前仅向美国少量抢先体验（Early Access）用户开放，随后暂停了推送。 此次更新意味着 FSD v14 Lite 推送重新启动，也让外界看到了其未来面向更多普通用户开放的希望，同时 Lite 版本的功能和体验也越…
items.summary_en: Tesla resumed FSD v14 Lite rollout for HW3 vehicles with version 2026.20.6.10, adding features from full FSD v14 to narrow the gap with HW4. The distilled model aims to provide near-HW4 functionality on older hardware.
items.why_zh: 特斯拉通过FSD v14 Lite持续提升老款车型自动驾驶能力，延长HW3硬件生命周期。
items.why_en: Tesla's FSD v14 Lite update enhances autonomous driving on older HW3 vehicles, extending their lifecycle.

items.title_zh: Anthropic在作者集体版权诉讼中达成15亿美元和解
items.title_en: Anthropic's $1.5 billion settlement in authors' class action copyright lawsuit gets approved
items.summary_zh: Anthropic在作者集体版权诉讼中提出的15亿美元和解方案获得批准。该诉讼涉及作者指控Anthropic未经授权使用其作品训练AI模型。和解金额高达15亿美元，是AI领域版权纠纷中规模最大的和解之一，可能对AI公司使用受版权保护材料的方式产生深远影响。
items.summary_en: Anthropic's $1.5 billion settlement in authors' class action copyright lawsuit gets approved The Hindu
items.why_zh: 该和解为AI版权纠纷树立重要先例，影响未来AI训练数据的使用规范。
items.why_en: This settlement sets a major precedent for AI copyright disputes, impacting future data usage norms.

items.title_zh: 爱尔兰银行任命Prag Sharma为首席人工智能官
items.title_en: Bank of Ireland Announces Appointment of Prag Sharma to Chief Artificial Intelligence Officer
items.summary_zh: 爱尔兰银行宣布任命Prag Sharma担任首席人工智能官（CAIO）。这一任命表明该银行正加速将AI技术融入其业务运营，以提升效率和服务质量。Prag Sharma将负责制定和实施银行的AI战略，推动AI在风险管理、客户服务等领域的应用。
items.summary_en: Bank of Ireland Announces Appointment of Prag Sharma to Chief Artificial Intelligence Officer marketscreener.com
items.why_zh: 银行设立CAIO职位反映了金融行业对AI战略的日益重视。
items.why_en: The appointment highlights the growing importance of AI strategy in the banking sector.

items.title_zh: AI 浪潮推动全球半导体需求，韩国 7 月前 20 天出口额同比增 62.9% 创新高
items.title_en: AI Demand Drives South Korea's July 1-20 Exports Up 62.9% YoY, Chip Exports Surge 180.6%
items.summary_zh: IT之家 7 月 21 日消息，彭博社今天（7 月 21 日）发布博文，报道称基于韩国海关公布的最新数据，AI 浪潮推动全球半导体需求增长， 7 月前 20 天（已调整工作日差异）出口额同比增长 62.9%，刷新历年 7 年韩国出口额纪录。 IT之家曾于 7 月 1 日报道， 韩国 6 月出口额达到 1022.5 亿美元（IT之家注：现汇率约合 6949.42 亿元人民币），同比增长 70.9% ；韩国 6 月前 20 天出口额增长 49.7%。 未经工作日差异调整的基础数据上，出口增长了 52.3%，进口增长了 20%，贸易顺差达到 122 亿美元。 彭博社指出全球持续投资 AI 和数据中心建设，推动韩国半导体产业出口强劲。7 月前 20 天，韩国芯片出口同比增长 180.6%。电脑相关产品的出货量增长了近 232%，燃料出口增长了 33.4%。汽车出口下降了 10.6%。
items.summary_en: South Korea's exports for July 1-20 surged 62.9% year-on-year (adjusted for working days), driven by AI-fueled semiconductor demand. Chip exports soared 180.6%, and computer-related shipments rose nearly 232%, while auto exports fell 10.6%.
items.why_zh: 韩国出口数据凸显AI对全球半导体需求的强劲拉动作用。
items.why_en: South Korea's export data underscores AI's strong boost to global semiconductor demand.

items.title_zh: Sakana AI 推出网络安全模型 Fugu Cyber：领域基准测试表现优于 GPT-5.5-Cyber
items.title_en: Sakana AI Launches Fugu Cyber Model, Outperforms GPT-5.5-Cyber on Security Benchmarks
items.summary_zh: IT之家 7 月 21 日消息，日本人工智能初创企业 Sakana AI 当地时间今日发布了其专为应对现代网络防御的复杂性而打造的 Fugu Cyber 模型。 这一模型在业界最具挑战性的安全基准测试中均取得了卓越的性能：CyberGym 成功率达 86.9%、CTI-REALM 测试成功率达 72.1%， 表现甚至优于 OpenAI GPT-5.5-Cyber 和 Anthropic Claude Mythos-Preview 。 与标准 Fugu 类似，Fugu Cyber 是一个封装为单一 API 的多智能体系统，系统可针对用户请求动态编排专业智能体以处理复杂的多步骤任务。 除简单的 API 外，Sakana AI 还提供由其应用企业团队支持的人工智能驱动网络安全解决方案实地部署服务。
items.summary_en: Sakana AI released Fugu Cyber, a multi-agent system for cybersecurity that achieved 86.9% on CyberGym and 72.1% on CTI-REALM, outperforming GPT-5.5-Cyber and Claude Mythos-Preview. It is offered as a single API with optional deployment services.
items.why_zh: Fugu Cyber在网络安全基准测试中超越顶级模型，展示了多智能体系统的潜力。
items.why_en: Fugu Cyber's superior performance on security benchmarks highlights the potential of multi-agent systems in cybersecurity.

items.title_zh: 收购中科加禾补齐算力短板，智谱早盘大涨超25%
items.title_en: Zhipu AI Acquires Zhongke Jiahe to Fill Computing Power Gap, Shares Surge Over 25%
items.summary_zh: 收购中科加禾补齐算力短板，智谱早盘大涨超25% 21财经
items.summary_en: Zhipu AI acquired Zhongke Jiahe to strengthen its computing power infrastructure. The deal boosted Zhipu's stock by over 25% in morning trading, as it fills a gap in AI training and inference capabilities.
items.why_zh: 收购中科加禾标志着智谱从模型层向算力层延伸，补齐基础设施短板对其长期竞争力至关重要。
items.why_en: The acquisition marks Zhipu's expansion from model layer to computing power layer, crucial for long-term competitiveness.

items.title_zh: Kimi K3冲击？ 瑞银反驳： 开源模型更消耗内存
items.title_en: UBS Rebuts Kimi K3 Impact: Open-Source Models Consume More Memory
items.summary_zh: Kimi K3冲击？ 瑞银反驳： 开源模型更消耗内存 手机网易网
items.summary_en: UBS countered concerns about Moonshot AI's Kimi K3 model, arguing that open-source models consume more memory, potentially offsetting the advantage of large parameter counts like Kimi K3's 2.8 trillion.
items.why_zh: 瑞银的观点挑战了参数规模决定模型优势的普遍认知，强调部署效率的重要性。
items.why_en: UBS's rebuttal challenges the notion that larger parameter counts guarantee superiority, highlighting deployment efficiency.

items.title_zh: 美国法官批准Anthropic 15亿美元版权诉讼和解
items.title_en: US judge approves Anthropic's $1.5 billion settlement of copyright lawsuit
items.summary_zh: 美国法官批准了AI公司Anthropic提出的15亿美元版权诉讼和解协议。该诉讼由多位作者和出版商提起，指控Anthropic在训练其AI模型时未经授权使用受版权保护的作品。和解协议的具体条款尚未完全公开，但据悉Anthropic将支付巨额赔偿并调整数据使用政策。此案为AI版权纠纷树立了重要先例。
items.summary_en: US judge approves Anthropic's $1.5 billion settlement of copyright lawsuit ETLegalWorld.com
items.why_zh: 该和解金额巨大，可能重塑AI公司使用训练数据的版权合规标准。
items.why_en: The massive settlement could reshape copyright compliance standards for AI training data usage.

items.title_zh: 机构：今年全球芯片设备销售额有望增长23.2%，到2028年达到2295亿美元
items.title_en: Global Semiconductor Equipment Sales Forecast to Reach $229.5B by 2028, Driven by AI Infrastructure Investment
items.summary_zh: 周二公布的一份行业报告显示，受人工智能（AI）基础设施投资增加的推动，全球半导体制造设备市场预计将在2028年达到历史最高水平。根据全球半导体行业协会（SEMI）发布的报告，2026年全球半导体设备销售额预计将增长23.2%，达到1659亿美元，到2028年将创下历史新高，达到2295亿美元。SEMI代表全球约3000家电子设计和制造企业。（新浪财经）
items.summary_en: A report from SEMI forecasts global semiconductor equipment sales to grow 23.2% in 2026 to $165.9B, reaching a record $229.5B by 2028, driven by increased AI infrastructure investment. The report highlights the sustained demand for chips from AI technology development.
items.why_zh: 该预测表明AI基础设施投资正成为半导体设备市场增长的核心动力，对全球科技产业链具有重要影响。
items.why_en: The forecast indicates that AI infrastructure investment is becoming a key driver for semiconductor equipment market growth, with significant implications for the global tech supply chain.

items.title_zh: Kimi K3冲击？ 瑞银反驳： 开源模型更消耗内存
items.title_en: UBS Refutes Kimi K3 Impact Claim: Open-Source Models Consume More Memory
items.summary_zh: Kimi K3冲击？ 瑞银反驳： 开源模型更消耗内存 搜狐网
items.summary_en: UBS has countered claims about the impact of Moonshot AI's open-source Kimi K3 model, arguing that open-source models consume more memory, which could limit deployment efficiency. This has sparked further debate on resource consumption between open-source and closed-source models.
items.why_zh: 该观点挑战了开源模型在效率上的优势认知，对AI模型选型和部署策略具有参考价值。
items.why_en: This view challenges the perceived efficiency advantage of open-source models, offering insights for AI model selection and deployment strategies.

items.title_zh: Momenta Robotaxi 获深圳智能网联汽车道路测试许可
items.title_en: Momenta Robotaxi Obtains Shenzhen Road Test Permit, Accelerating Global Expansion
items.summary_zh: IT之家 7 月 21 日消息，智能驾驶公司 Momenta 今日宣布，其 Robotaxi 已正式获得深圳市智能网联汽车道路测试许可，并将于近期在深圳开展实地测试。至此，深圳成为 Momenta Robotaxi 在中国境内继上海、苏州、无锡之后落地的又一核心城市。 从全球布局来看，Momenta Robotaxi 的测试与运营网络已覆盖多个国内外城市。国内方面，继上海、苏州之后，公司于 2026 年 1 月正式获得无锡市智能网联汽车道路测试与示范应用许可并启动测试。 海外方面，Momenta 已在德国慕尼黑、阿联酋阿布扎比等城市落地，并积极拓展欧洲其他地区、新加坡及日本等市场。 在国际化生态合作层面，Momenta 已与 Uber、Grab、Lumo、享道出行等全球头部出行平台，以及梅赛德斯-奔驰等汽车制造商建立了战略合作。其中，与 Uber 联合的 Robotaxi 项目已确定德国慕尼黑为首发城市，预计于 2026 年在当地正式启动运营服务。据企业发布的信息，Momenta 计划在 2026 年内于全球多个新城市及区域落地高阶自动驾驶，稳步推进技术场景验证与民生出行服务探索。 技术层面，Momenta 于 2026 年 4 月正式发布 R7 强化学习世界模型，并已投入 L4 级自动驾驶实际应用。该模型采用三层架构设计：世界模型预训练层压缩物理规律，世界模型仿真层推演长尾场景，…
items.summary_en: Momenta's Robotaxi has obtained a road test permit in Shenzhen, expanding its domestic footprint. Globally, Momenta has operations in Munich and Abu Dhabi, with plans to enter more markets. The company has partnered with Uber, Grab, and Mercedes-Benz, and its R7 reinforcement learning world model is already in use for L4 autonomous driving.
items.why_zh: Momenta的全球布局和技术进展表明中国自动驾驶企业正加速国际化，对行业竞争格局具有重要影响。
items.why_en: Momenta's global expansion and technological progress highlight the accelerating internationalization of Chinese autonomous driving companies, impacting the competitive landscape.

items.title_zh: 月之暗面Kimi K3参数达2.8万亿，华为昇腾950量产催化Agent商业化
items.title_en: Moonshot AI's Kimi K3 Reaches 2.8 Trillion Parameters, Huawei Ascend 950 Mass Production Boosts Agent Commercialization
items.summary_zh: 月之暗面Kimi K3参数达2.8万亿，华为昇腾950量产催化Agent商业化 观点网
items.summary_en: Moonshot AI's Kimi K3 model has 2.8 trillion parameters, while Huawei's Ascend 950 chip mass production is expected to accelerate AI agent commercialization. This combination has sparked market discussion on the synergy between large AI models and computing infrastructure.
items.why_zh: Kimi K3的超大参数规模和昇腾950的量产标志着AI大模型与国产算力的重要突破，对AI产业生态具有深远影响。
items.why_en: The massive parameter scale of Kimi K3 and the mass production of Ascend 950 represent significant breakthroughs in AI models and domestic computing power, with profound implications for the AI ecosystem.

items.title_zh: 月之暗面Kimi K3参数达2.8万亿，华为昇腾950量产催化Agent商业化
items.title_en: Kimi K3 Reaches 2.8 Trillion Parameters; Huawei Ascend 950 Mass Production Boosts Agent Commercialization
items.summary_zh: 月之暗面Kimi K3参数达2.8万亿，华为昇腾950量产催化Agent商业化 观点网
items.summary_en: Moonshot AI's Kimi K3 model has 2.8 trillion parameters, one of the largest. Mass production of Huawei's Ascend 950 chip will boost AI agent commercialization by providing computing power.
items.why_zh: Kimi K3的超大参数规模和华为昇腾950的量产，标志着AI模型规模和算力基础设施的双重突破。
items.why_en: The massive scale of Kimi K3 and mass production of Huawei Ascend 950 represent breakthroughs in both model size and computing infrastructure.

items.title_zh: 智谱的算力野望浮出水面，自建1GW机房、数亿收购中科系Infra企业、布局自研芯片，加速去“英伟达化”
items.title_en: Zhipu Accelerates De-NVIDIAization: Self-Built 1GW Data Center, Acquisition of CAS Infra Firm, and In-House Chip Plans
items.summary_zh: 智谱的算力野望浮出水面，自建1GW机房、数亿收购中科系Infra企业、布局自研芯片，加速去“英伟达化” 虎嗅
items.summary_en: Zhipu AI is aggressively building its own computing infrastructure, including a 1GW data center, acquisition of a CAS-affiliated infra company, and in-house chip development, to reduce reliance on NVIDIA. These moves highlight the industry's push for computing autonomy.
items.why_zh: 智谱的算力布局标志着中国AI公司加速摆脱对英伟达的依赖，可能重塑国内AI芯片和基础设施市场。
items.why_en: Zhipu's computing infrastructure push signals a strategic shift away from NVIDIA dependency, potentially reshaping China's AI chip and infrastructure landscape.

items.title_zh: 智谱的算力野望浮出水面，自建1GW机房、数亿收购中科系Infra企业、布局自研芯片，加速去“英伟达化”
items.title_en: Zhipu AI Accelerates NVIDIA Independence: 1GW Data Center, Acquisitions, Self-Developed Chips
items.summary_zh: 智谱的算力野望浮出水面，自建1GW机房、数亿收购中科系Infra企业、布局自研芯片，加速去“英伟达化” 虎嗅
items.summary_en: Zhipu AI builds 1GW data center, acquires Chinese infra firms, develops own chips to reduce NVIDIA dependence.
items.why_zh: 智谱的算力自主战略代表了中国AI公司应对芯片限制的典型路径，对行业供应链安全有示范意义。
items.why_en: Zhipu's self-reliance strategy exemplifies Chinese AI firms' response to chip restrictions, impacting supply chain security.

items.title_zh: 腾讯混元推出智能体Hyra-1.0
items.title_en: Tencent Hunyuan Launches Hyra-1.0 Agent for Research and Engineering
items.summary_zh: 36氪获悉，7月21日，腾讯混元宣布推出Hyra（Hunyuan Research Agent）首个版本Hyra-1.0。据腾讯混元介绍，这是一个能够递归自我改进、面向性能导向的研究与工程任务的智能体。除了模型研发与科学发现，Hyra还可以进入游戏、设计和内容创作等开放场景，根据自博弈、自评价和用户反馈持续迭代策略产物。
items.summary_en: Tencent Hunyuan released Hyra-1.0, a recursive self-improving agent for research and engineering tasks. It can also be applied to gaming, design, and content creation, iterating via self-play and user feedback.
items.why_zh: Hyra-1.0展示了腾讯在AI智能体领域的进展，有望提升研发效率和跨场景应用能力。
items.why_en: Hyra-1.0 demonstrates Tencent's progress in AI agents, potentially boosting R&D efficiency and cross-domain applications.

items.title_zh: 月之暗面发布Kimi K3加剧美国芯片股抛售；小米或上调手机出货目标；三星电子将成立机器人部门加速研发及商业化| 日报
items.title_en: Moonshot AI's Kimi K3 Intensifies US Chip Stock Selloff; Xiaomi May Raise Phone Shipment Target; Samsung Forms Robotics Division
items.summary_zh: 月之暗面发布Kimi K3加剧美国芯片股抛售；小米或上调手机出货目标；三星电子将成立机器人部门加速研发及商业化| 日报 电子工程专辑
items.summary_en: Moonshot AI's Kimi K3 launch intensified US chip stock selloff amid concerns over reduced demand. Xiaomi may raise phone shipment targets, while Samsung forms a robotics division to accelerate commercialization.
items.why_zh: Kimi K3加剧芯片股抛售凸显中国AI模型对全球芯片市场的影响，三星和小米的动向则显示行业多元化发展。
items.why_en: Kimi K3's impact on chip stocks highlights China's AI influence on global semiconductor markets, while Samsung and Xiaomi show industry diversification.

items.title_zh: 月之暗面发布Kimi K3开源模型，API涨价3倍，会员体系调整引争议
items.title_en: Moonshot AI Releases Kimi K3 Open-Source Model, Triples API Price, Controversial Membership Changes
items.summary_zh: 月之暗面发布Kimi K3开源模型，API涨价3倍，会员体系调整引争议 虎嗅
items.summary_en: Moonshot AI released the open-source Kimi K3 model, tripled API prices, and adjusted membership plans, sparking controversy. The moves aim to balance costs and commercialization but have drawn user criticism.
items.why_zh: Kimi K3的涨价和会员调整反映了AI模型商业化的挑战，可能影响开源生态和开发者关系。
items.why_en: Kimi K3's price hike and membership changes highlight commercialization challenges in AI, potentially impacting the open-source ecosystem and developer relations.

items.title_zh: 月之暗面发布Kimi K3开源模型，API涨价3倍，会员体系调整引争议
items.title_en: Moonshot AI Releases Open-Source Kimi K3, API Price Triples, Membership Changes Spark Controversy
items.summary_zh: 月之暗面发布Kimi K3开源模型，API涨价3倍，会员体系调整引争议 虎嗅
items.summary_en: Moonshot AI released the open-source Kimi K3 model, tripled API prices, and adjusted membership plans, sparking controversy among users and the industry. The changes may impact the developer ecosystem and user satisfaction.
items.why_zh: API大幅涨价和会员调整可能改变AI模型服务的商业模式，对开发者和企业用户产生直接影响。
items.why_en: The significant API price hike and membership changes could alter the business model of AI model services, directly impacting developers and enterprise users.

items.title_zh: 小鹏集团发布 TuringViT，宣称重构视觉大模型训练范式
items.title_en: XPeng Unveils TuringViT Vision Encoder, Redefining Visual Model Training Paradigm
items.summary_zh: IT之家 7 月 21 日消息，小鹏集团今日发布 TuringViT 高效视觉编码器 ，面向 VLM / VLA 时代系统性重构视觉编码器的架构设计、数据范式与训练流程。 小鹏集团表示， TuringViT 将全面支撑智能驾驶、智能座舱、IRON 人形机器人三大业务场景 ，同时为行业提供了一条可复现、低成本训练 SOTA 级（State-of-the-Art，最新技术水平）视觉 Transformer 的技术路径，推动先进视觉大模型从“头部团队专属”走向“行业普惠”。 ▲ TuringViT 的块架构和模型配置 据介绍，TuringViT 从架构、数据、训练三个维度同步突破，打造了“线性注意力主导 + 高质量数据治理 + 原生动态分辨率”的完整技术体系，实现了效果、效率与落地性的三重提升。 TuringViT 共推出两个规格版本： TuringViT-18L 包含 3 组 Turing Block（共 15 层 TLA+3 层 MHA），主打动态分辨率下的高效部署； TuringViT-24L 包含 4 组 Turing Block（共 20 层 TLA+4 层 MHA），在保持线性计算主导的前提下进一步提升表征能力。 实测数据显示，随着输入分辨率提升，TuringViT 的延迟增长曲线远平缓于标准 softmax ViT，高分辨率下的效率优势愈发显著。在 1536×1536 分辨…
items.summary_en: XPeng released TuringViT, a vision encoder for VLM/VLA era, supporting autonomous driving, smart cockpit, and humanoid robots. It features linear attention, high-quality data, and dynamic resolution, with two versions (18L/24L) offering lower latency at high resolutions.
items.why_zh: TuringViT通过架构创新降低了视觉大模型的训练成本，有望推动行业普及并增强小鹏在AI领域的竞争力。
items.why_en: TuringViT reduces training costs for vision models through architectural innovation, potentially democratizing AI and boosting XPeng's competitiveness.

items.title_zh: 马斯克称训练2万亿参数模型 Kimi回应欢迎加入两万亿俱乐部
items.title_en: Musk Claims Training 2-Trillion-Parameter Model; Kimi Welcomes to 'Two Trillion Club'
items.summary_zh: 马斯克称训练2万亿参数模型 Kimi回应欢迎加入两万亿俱乐部 新浪网
items.summary_en: Elon Musk claimed his AI company is training a 2-trillion-parameter model. Kimi responded by welcoming him to the 'Two Trillion Club', hinting at its own similar scale. The exchange highlights the intensifying parameter race in AI.
items.why_zh: 参数规模竞赛反映AI行业对模型能力的极致追求，但实际效果仍需验证。
items.why_en: The parameter race reflects the industry's pursuit of extreme model scale, though actual performance remains to be validated.

items.title_zh: 轻量级1D CNN用于软毛绒伴侣的情感触觉分类
items.title_en: Design and Validation of a Lightweight 1D CNN for Affective Touch Classification in Soft Plush Companions
items.summary_zh: arXiv上发布了一项研究，提出并验证了一种轻量级1D卷积神经网络（CNN），用于软毛绒伴侣机器人的情感触觉分类。该研究提供了一个完整的开源MATLAB框架，用于开发和验证紧凑型深度学习模型。研究团队从25名参与者收集了1326个标注手势序列，构建了符合FAIR原则的数据集。该工作旨在提升社交辅助技术在软体交互中的情感识别能力，为机器人伴侣的情感交互提供更鲁棒的解决方案。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2607.16196v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Soft, sensorized companions offer a physically safe and emotionally intuitive interface for socially assistive technologies, yet their deformability and multichannel tactile sensing complicate the robust interpretation of human affect. This study presents a complete open-source MATLAB-based framework for the development and validation of compact deep learning models for affective touch recognition in soft interactive companions. As a primary contribution, a diverse FAIR-compliant dataset of 1326 labelled gesture sequences collected from 25 partic…
items.why_zh: 该研究为软体社交辅助机器人的情感触觉识别提供了高效、可复现的解决方案，有助于提升人机交互的自然度。
items.why_en: This work offers an efficient, reproducible solution for affective touch recognition in soft social robots, enhancing human-robot interaction naturalness.

items.title_zh: 约束锚定推理轨迹：缓解多模态大模型的错误雪崩
items.title_en: Constraint-Anchored Reasoning Traces
items.summary_zh: arXiv上的一项新研究指出，自回归多模态大语言模型（MLLM）存在错误雪崩问题：链式推理中早期的一个错误推断会污染后续所有推理。研究发现，在先进的开源MLLM中，一旦首次错误发生，65%的情况下推理会级联失败。现有缓解方法如多链采样、事后自我验证或完整程序合成，要么缺乏符号基础，要么发现错误太晚。该研究提出了一种约束锚定推理轨迹方法，旨在通过引入符号约束来阻止错误传播，提升推理的鲁棒性。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2607.16727v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Autoregressive multimodal large language models (MLLMs) suffer from error snowballing: a single incorrect inference early in a chainof-thought (CoT) trace corrupts all downstream reasoning. We find that in state-of-the-art open-source MLLMs, once the first error occurs, the reasoning cascades into failure across all remaining steps in 65% of such cases (a metric we term the snowball rate). Existing mitigations-sampling multiple chains, post-hoc self-verification, or full program synthesis-either lack symbolic grounding, catch errors too late, or…
items.why_zh: 该研究揭示了多模态大模型推理中的关键缺陷，提出的约束锚定方法有望显著提升模型可靠性和推理准确性。
items.why_en: This study highlights a critical flaw in MLLM reasoning and proposes a method to improve reliability and accuracy through constraint anchoring.

items.title_zh: 重新思考异构大模型合并：加权平均视角
items.title_en: Rethinking Heterogeneous LLM Merging: A Weighted Model Averaging Perspective
items.summary_zh: arXiv上的一篇论文探讨了异构大语言模型合并的可能性：能否通过直接加权平均合并参数空间差异巨大的模型，而无需训练或语义对齐？现有异构融合方法通常需要蒸馏、适配器、潜在空间学习或路由等复杂技术。该研究通过无训练的维度适配和比例控制插值，重新审视了这一反直觉问题。在联合式合并中，他们扩展了方法，并展示了在无需额外训练的情况下，直接加权平均可能对真正不同的十亿参数检查点有效。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2607.18026v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Can large language models with substantially different parameter spaces be merged by direct weighted averaging, without training or semantic alignment? Existing heterogeneous fusion methods typically introduce distillation, adapters, learned latent spaces, routing, or feature alignment, leaving open whether a simpler recipe can work for genuinely different billion-parameter checkpoints. We revisit this counterintuitive question through training-free dimensional adaptation followed by ratio-controlled interpolation. In union-style merging, we expa…
items.why_zh: 该研究挑战了异构模型合并的传统认知，提出了一种更简单的合并方法，可能降低模型融合的复杂度和成本。
items.why_en: This work challenges conventional wisdom on heterogeneous model merging, offering a simpler approach that could reduce complexity and cost.

items.title_zh: 临床LLM中证据充分性提示的安全增益与帮助性成本依赖于评判模型
items.title_en: Judge-dependent safety gains and model-specific helpfulness costs of evidence-sufficiency prompting in clinical LLMs
items.summary_zh: 一项新研究探讨了在临床语言模型中使用“证据充分性提示”是否真的能减少不安全、过度自信的回答，以及这种效果是否依赖于评判模型。研究使用了四个模型（如GPT-5.5）和三个公共基准数据集，发现安全增益很大程度上取决于评判模型，且帮助性成本因模型而异。结果表明，仅靠提示无法可靠地提高临床LLM的安全性，需要更稳健的评估方法。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2607.18086v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Background: LLM judges increasingly score whether clinical language models give overconfident answers under incomplete evidence, yet whether a measured "safety gain" reflects real behavior change or the judge's calibration is unresolved. Using a structured evidence-sufficiency prompt as a test case, we asked whether it reduces unsafe overconfident answers, how far that effect depends on the scoring judge, and what it costs in helpfulness. Methods: In a retrospective public-data benchmark (Real-POCQi, HealthBench, MedRBench), four models (GPT-5.5,…
items.why_zh: 该研究揭示了临床LLM安全评估中一个关键但常被忽视的问题：安全增益可能只是评判模型的假象，而非真实行为改变。
items.why_en: This study highlights a critical but often overlooked issue in clinical LLM safety evaluation: measured safety gains may be artifacts of the judge rather than genuine behavior change.

items.title_zh: OpenMHC：加速可穿戴基础模型科学的最大开放数据集
items.title_en: OpenMHC: Accelerating the Science of Wearable Foundation Models
items.summary_zh: 研究人员发布了OpenMyHeartCounts（OpenMHC），这是迄今为止最大、最全面的开放获取可穿戴健康数据集，旨在加速可穿戴健康领域的开放科学。该数据集包含大量可穿戴设备数据，并附带开源的基础模型实现和可复现的训练代码，以解决当前可穿戴数据集不公开、模型权重不开放的问题。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2607.16235v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Mobile and wearable devices offer an unprecedented opportunity for continuous, passive health monitoring and active health coaching. However, the largest wearable datasets are not publicly available for research, and leading wearable foundation models trained on such datasets are rarely open-weight or come with reproducible training code. To accelerate open science in wearable health, we release OpenMyHeartCounts (OpenMHC), the largest and most comprehensive open-access wearable health dataset to date, alongside open-source implementations of r…
items.why_zh: 该数据集填补了可穿戴健康领域公开数据稀缺的空白，为开发可复现的基础模型提供了关键资源。
items.why_en: This dataset fills a critical gap in publicly available wearable health data, providing essential resources for reproducible foundation model research.

items.title_zh: GenSyn10：用于图像分类基准测试的多生成式AI数据集
items.title_en: GenSyn10: A Multi-Generative AI Dataset For Benchmarking Image Classification
items.summary_zh: 研究人员推出了GenSyn10，一个包含60,000张合成图像的数据集，由三种不同的先进生成模型（FLUX.2-dev、HunyuanImage-3.0和Qwen-Image-2512）生成，用于推进AI生成图像检测的研究。该数据集与CIFAR-10对齐，旨在帮助开发能够检测未知生成器输出的可靠检测器。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2607.16283v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: The rapid advancement of generative AI has outpaced our ability to reliably detect its outputs, particularly when detectors encounter generators they have not seen before. We introduce GenSyn10, a CIFAR-10-aligned synthetic image dataset of 60,000 images (10 classes, 32$\times$32, 50k/10k split) generated using three architecturally diverse state-of-the-art models: FLUX.2-dev (Rectified Flow Transformer), HunyuanImage-3.0 (MoE Transformer), and Qwen-Image-2512 (Multimodal Diffusion Transformer), to advance research in AI-generated image detecti…
items.why_zh: 该数据集为检测来自未知生成器的AI合成图像提供了基准，解决了生成式AI快速发展带来的检测挑战。
items.why_en: This dataset provides a benchmark for detecting AI-generated images from unseen generators, addressing a key challenge posed by rapid generative AI advances.

items.title_zh: SynthSite：用于工人吊物下方检测的隐私感知合成视频基准
items.title_en: Privacy-Aware Synthetic Video Benchmarking and Relational Evaluation for Worker-Under-Suspended-Load Detection
items.summary_zh: 研究人员发布了SynthSite，一个包含55个剪辑的合成视频基准，用于检测建筑工地中工人处于悬挂物下方的危险场景。该基准采用隐私感知的混合生成流程，涵盖了多种负载配置、视角和遮挡条件，解决了真实危险场景数据稀缺且难以公开的问题。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2607.16351v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Publicly shareable construction-video benchmarks remain scarce, especially for safety-critical hazards that are rare, dangerous to stage, and difficult to release. We study worker under suspended load, a relational hazard that depends on worker-load geometry and temporal persistence rather than object detection alone. We introduce SynthSite, a focused synthetic video benchmark of 55 clips spanning varied load configurations, viewpoints, clutter, occlusions, and surveillance conditions, together with a privacy-aware hybrid generation workflow th…
items.why_zh: 该基准为建筑安全中罕见但危险的场景提供了可公开共享的数据，推动了关系型危险检测的研究。
items.why_en: This benchmark provides publicly shareable data for rare but critical construction safety hazards, advancing relational hazard detection research.

items.title_zh: 基于少样本连续上下文赌博机的预测-校正循环用于需求预测
items.title_en: A Predict-then-Correct Loop Based on Few-Shot Continuous Contextual Bandit for Demand Forecasting
items.summary_zh: 该研究提出了一种预测-校正（PtC）框架，用于改进零售需求预测，特别是在需求快速变化且新标签稀疏的情况下。该框架保留第一阶段的机器学习预测，并通过少样本连续上下文赌博机校正策略（结合相似SKU增强和top-p掩码更新）进行调整。在沃尔玛零售数据和独家饮料数据集上的实验表明，该方法能有效提升预测准确性。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2607.16354v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Retail demand forecasting remains difficult when demand shifts faster than static forecasting models can be retrained, especially in early demand cycles where newly observed labels are sparse. To address this, this study aims to improve adaptive retail forecasting by proposing a predict-then-correct (PtC) framework that retains a first-stage machine learning (ML) forecast and applies a few-shot continuous contextual bandit correction policy with similar-SKUs augmentation and top-p masked updating. Across Walmart retail data and an exclusive bev…
items.why_zh: 该框架解决了零售业中需求快速变化时静态模型难以适应的问题，为动态预测提供了新思路。
items.why_en: This framework addresses the challenge of static models failing under rapid demand shifts, offering a new approach for adaptive retail forecasting.

items.title_zh: K-IPO：保持特征重要性排序的过采样方法用于不平衡表格数据
items.title_en: K-IPO: Kendall-constrained Importance Preserving Oversampling for Imbalanced Tabular Data
items.summary_zh: 研究人员提出了K-IPO（Kendall约束重要性保持过采样），一种生成器无关的“生成-选择”框架，用于在不平衡表格数据分类中保持原始数据的特征重要性排序。现有过采样方法可能扭曲特征重要性，而K-IPO通过约束合成样本的特征重要性排序与原始数据一致，从而避免这种扭曲。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2607.16478v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Oversampling is widely used to address class imbalance in tabular classification, but existing methods can distort the feature importance ranking underlying model explanations. Although recent studies have quantified this distortion by comparing real and synthetic data, none have actively sought to prevent it. In this paper, we introduce Kendall-constrained Importance-Preserving Oversampling (K-IPO), a generator-agnostic, "generate-then-select" framework that preserves the original data's feature importance ranking during augmentation. K-IPO it…
items.why_zh: 该工作首次主动防止过采样对特征重要性的扭曲，对于模型可解释性至关重要。
items.why_en: This work is the first to actively prevent distortion of feature importance by oversampling, which is crucial for model interpretability.

items.title_zh: AI在巴拿赫空间理论中实现数学发现：五个新结果的证明
items.title_en: Mathematical Discovery in the Wild: AI-Guided Proofs in Banach Space Theory
items.summary_zh: 该研究展示了当前语言模型在数学研究中的能力：在巴拿赫空间理论中，AI系统生成了五个新结果的关键思想和证明，随后由人类验证和完善。此外，还开发了一个自动化系统，用于搜索文献中的开放问题并尝试大规模求解。结果表明，语言模型在数学发现方面具有潜力，但专家验证仍然重要。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2607.17388v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: We investigate the capacity of current language models to contribute to mathematical research. In Banach space theory, AI systems generated key ideas and proofs for five new results, which were then verified and refined by humans. We also developed an automated system that searches the literature for open problems and attempts solutions at scale. Our results show both the potential of language models for mathematical discovery and the continuing importance of expert verification.
items.why_zh: 该研究首次展示了AI在纯数学领域（巴拿赫空间理论）中生成可验证的新结果，标志着AI辅助数学发现的重要进展。
items.why_en: This study demonstrates for the first time that AI can generate verifiable new results in pure mathematics (Banach space theory), marking a significant step in AI-assisted mathematical discovery.

items.title_zh: 2026年世界杯作为LLM预测智能体的无污染基准：四个模型、一个博彩公司和104场比赛
items.title_en: FIFA World Cup 2026 as a Contamination-Free Benchmark for LLM Forecasting Agents: Four Models, a Bookmaker, and 104 Matches
items.summary_zh: 研究人员推出了WC2026-Agents基准，用于评估大语言模型作为自主预测智能体的能力。该基准基于2026年世界杯的104场比赛，四个前沿模型（Claude Opus 4.8、ChatGPT、Gemini 3.1 Pro和Grok）执行相同的搜索-行动-反思循环：收集证据、下注（虚拟100美元）、赛后反思。该基准避免了数据污染问题，因为所有事件都是未来的。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2607.17765v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: We introduce WC2026-Agents, a benchmark and dataset for evaluating large language models (LLMs) as autonomous forecasting agents on real, future events. For every one of the 104 matches of the 2026 FIFA World Cup, four frontier models -- Claude Opus 4.8, ChatGPT (GPT-5.5, high reasoning), Gemini 3.1 Pro, and Grok (Expert Mode) -- ran an identical search-act-reflect loop: gather evidence with a web tool, commit to a 1X2 (team-A win / draw / team-B win) distribution and a virtual 100-USD bet, and, after the match, reflect given only the final sco…
items.why_zh: 该基准利用未来事件避免了数据污染，为评估LLM预测能力提供了更可靠的方法。
items.why_en: This benchmark avoids data contamination by using future events, providing a more reliable evaluation of LLM forecasting capabilities.

items.title_zh: AgentCompass：统一的智能体能力评估基础设施
items.title_en: AgentCompass: A Unified Evaluation Infrastructure for Agent Capabilities
items.summary_zh: 随着大语言模型（LLM）演变为自主智能体，统一的评估基础设施变得至关重要。然而，当前的评估流程高度碎片化且紧密耦合，阻碍了可重复性并导致工程冗余。为此，研究者提出了AgentCompass，一个开源、轻量级且可扩展的评估基础设施，用于评估基于LLM的智能体。AgentCompass将评估过程组织为三个独立组件：基准测试、测试框架和环境，从而实现了模块化和灵活性。该工作旨在解决现有评估管道的碎片化问题，提升可重复性并减少重复工程。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2607.13705v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: As Large Language Models (LLMs) evolve into autonomous agents, the need for unified evaluation infrastructure becomes critical. However, current evaluation pipelines remain highly fragmented and tightly coupled, hindering reproducibility and causing redundant engineering. To address this, we introduce AgentCompass, an open-source, lightweight, and extensible infrastructure for evaluating LLM-based agents. AgentCompass organizes the evaluation process around three independent components, namely Benchmark, Harness, and Environment, thereby enab…
items.why_zh: AgentCompass通过解耦评估组件，为智能体评估提供了统一、可复用的基础设施，有助于推动自主智能体研究的标准化。
items.why_en: AgentCompass provides a unified and reusable evaluation infrastructure for agent research, addressing fragmentation and improving reproducibility.

items.title_zh: RuBench：包含原生俄语任务描述的仓库级智能体编程基准
items.title_en: RuBench: A Repository-Level Agentic Coding Benchmark with Natively Authored Russian Task Specifications
items.summary_zh: 开发者越来越多地将实际维护工作委托给产品级编码智能体，并且许多任务以母语（如俄语）描述，风格类似客户请求而非精心编写的英文问题。为此，研究者推出了RuBench 1.0，一个包含25个任务的基准测试，这些任务来自五个活跃开源仓库（aiohttp、aiogram、Laravel、NestJS、Fastify）的最新修复提交，每个任务均以原生俄语编写（非翻译），并由上游维护者的回归测试评判。该基准旨在评估编码智能体处理真实世界、多语言任务的能力。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2607.06411v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Developers increasingly delegate real maintenance work to product-grade coding agents, and many state tasks in their native language, in the style of a customer request rather than a curated English issue. We introduce RuBench 1.0, a benchmark of 25 tasks mined from recent fix commits in five live open-source repositories (aiohttp, aiogram, Laravel, NestJS, Fastify), each specified natively in Russian -- written from scratch, not translated -- and judged by the upstream maintainer's regression tests, which we withhold from release. All…
items.why_zh: RuBench填补了非英语编程任务基准的空白，反映了开发者用母语描述需求的真实场景，对评估编码智能体的实用性至关重要。
items.why_en: RuBench addresses the lack of non-English coding benchmarks, reflecting real-world scenarios where developers describe tasks in their native language.

items.title_zh: Boogu-Image-0.1：在最小预算下提升开放智能体多模态生成能力
items.title_en: Boogu-Image-0.1: Boosting Open Agentic Multimodal Generation via Understanding under a Minimal Budget
items.summary_zh: 研究者推出了Boogu-Image-0.1，一个开源统一多模态理解与生成模型系列，包含Base、Turbo、Edit和Edit-Turbo变体。该模型在高质量文本到图像生成、快速推理、基于指令的编辑以及双语（中英文）文本渲染方面表现出竞争力。闭源多模态系统如Nano-Banana-Pro和GPT-Image-2通过系统级集成而非单一模型实现强性能，但其内部实践未公开。Boogu-Image-0.1旨在以最小预算提供开放、可复现的替代方案。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2607.13125v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: We introduce Boogu-Image-0.1, an open-source unified multimodal understanding and generation model family, comprising Base, Turbo, Edit, and Edit-Turbo variants. It delivers competitive performance in high-quality text-to-image generation, fast inference, instruction-based editing, and bilingual (Chinese-English) text rendering. Closed-source multimodal systems like Nano-Banana-Pro and GPT-Image-2 achieve strong performance through system-level integration rather than a single model, yet their internal practices remain largely undisclos…
items.why_zh: Boogu-Image-0.1以开源方式提供了与闭源系统竞争的多模态能力，降低了研究门槛并促进了可复现性。
items.why_en: Boogu-Image-0.1 provides an open-source competitive alternative to closed multimodal systems, lowering barriers for research and enabling reproducibility.

items.title_zh: Muon优化器何时有助于智能体强化学习？
items.title_en: When Does Muon Help Agentic Reinforcement Learning?
items.summary_zh: Muon优化器在大规模预训练中与AdamW竞争，但其在强化学习后训练中的价值尚不明确。研究者在稀疏奖励的智能体强化学习场景中，使用Qwen2.5-0.5B-Instruct模型在ALFWorld上进行了单种子对比实验。在Group-in-Group策略优化（GiGPO）下，仅对隐藏权重矩阵应用Muon将最终窗口验证成功率从0.290提升至0.546（+88%），而高学习率AdamW对照组无后更新成功。效果依赖于优势估计器，表明Muon在特定条件下对智能体强化学习有益。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2607.16169v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Muon is competitive with AdamW in large-scale pre-training, but its value for reinforcement-learning (RL) post-training remains unclear. We study vanilla Muon in sparse-reward agentic RL through matched single-seed comparisons with AdamW on ALFWorld using Qwen2.5-0.5B-Instruct. Under Group-in-Group Policy Optimization (GiGPO), applying Muon only to hidden weight matrices raises final-window validation success from 0.290 to 0.546 (+88%); high-rate AdamW controls retain no post-update success. The effect depends on the advantage estimator…
items.why_zh: 该研究揭示了Muon优化器在智能体强化学习中的适用条件，为训练更高效的智能体提供了优化器选择依据。
items.why_en: This study identifies conditions where Muon benefits agentic RL, guiding optimizer selection for training more efficient agents.

items.title_zh: EA-RMENet：基于深度学习的城市环境路径损耗预测
items.title_en: EA-RMENet -- Path Loss Prediction in Urban Environments using Deep Learning
items.summary_zh: 准确的路径损耗预测是无线网络规划的关键组成部分。当前方法难以平衡精度与计算效率。本文提出了高效注意力无线电地图估计网络（EA-RMENet），一种基于图像数据驱动的深度学习模型，用于无线电地图估计。EA-RMENet采用U-Net框架，结合EfficientNetB5编码器、注意力门控跳跃连接和空洞空间金字塔池化。该模型旨在提高城市环境中路径损耗预测的准确性，同时保持计算效率。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2607.16449v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Accurate path loss prediction is a critical component of wireless network planning. Current path loss prediction methods typically struggle to balance the trade-off between accuracy and computational efficiency. This paper proposes the Efficient Attention Radio Map Estimation Network (EA-RMENet) which is an image data-driven, deep learning (DL) model designed for radio map estimation (RME). EA-RMENet uses a U-Net framework with an EfficientNetB5 encoder, Attention Gated (AG) skip connections, and Atrous Spatial Pyramid Pooling (ASPP). The Efficie…
items.why_zh: EA-RMENet通过深度学习提升了城市环境路径损耗预测的精度与效率，对无线网络规划具有重要意义。
items.why_en: EA-RMENet improves accuracy and efficiency of path loss prediction in urban environments, benefiting wireless network planning.

items.title_zh: 用人类策略解释和调优Transformer大语言模型的算术任务
items.title_en: Explaining and Tuning Transformer-based LLMs in Arithmetic Tasks with Human Strategies
items.summary_zh: 基于Transformer的大语言模型在自然语言处理任务中表现优异，但在基本算术等简单问题上表现不佳，引发了对模型可靠性和安全性的担忧。本研究表明，在整数算术任务上训练的普通Transformer模型，其性能可以通过对人类学习者有效的方法来提升。研究者首先将算术任务分解为明确定义的子任务，然后应用人类学习策略进行调优，从而改善了模型在算术推理上的表现。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2607.17166v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Transformer-based large language models (LLMs) continue to achieve state-of-the-art performance across various natural language processing tasks. However, their subpar performance on seemingly elementary problems, such as basic arithmetic, raises concerns about model reliability, safety, and ethical deployment. In this study, we demonstrate that the performance of a vanilla Transformer model trained on integer arithmetic tasks can be improved using methods effective for human learners. We begin by decomposing the arithmetic task into well-defined…
items.why_zh: 该工作揭示了人类学习策略对提升LLM算术推理能力的有效性，为改进模型在基础任务上的可靠性提供了新思路。
items.why_en: This work demonstrates that human learning strategies can improve LLM performance on basic arithmetic, addressing reliability concerns.

items.title_zh: OpenLanguageModel：面向教育与研究的可读可组合小语言模型预训练
items.title_en: OpenLanguageModel: Readable and Composable Small-Language-Model Pretraining for Education and Research
items.summary_zh: OpenLanguageModel（OLM）是一个开源的PyTorch库，用于构建和预训练小语言模型，同时保持其内部机制透明。在OLM中，模型代码读起来就像架构本身：组件是普通模块，而Block、Residual、Repeat和Parallel描述了它们的连接方式。生成的模型可以无缝地从教学笔记本迁移到完整的预训练运行或研究消融实验。OLM将可读的模型层与分词器、本地和流式数据集、优化、混合精度、回调、检查点等功能连接起来，旨在促进教育和研究中的小语言模型开发。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2607.16669v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: OpenLanguageModel (OLM) is an open-source PyTorch library for building and pretraining small language models while keeping their machinery visible. In OLM, model code reads like the architecture: components are ordinary modules, while Block, Residual, Repeat, and Parallel describe how they are wired. The resulting model can move unchanged from a teaching notebook to a complete pretraining run or a research ablation. OLM connects this readable model layer to tokenizers, local and streaming datasets, optimization, mixed precision, callbacks, chec…
items.why_zh: OLM通过提供可读且可组合的模型构建方式，降低了小语言模型预训练的门槛，特别适合教育和研究场景。
items.why_en: OLM lowers the barrier for small language model pretraining by providing readable and composable code, ideal for education and research.

items.title_zh: OrderMoE：基于专家相似性的分布式边缘MoE推理
items.title_en: OrderMoE: An expert similarity driven distributed edge MoE inference
items.summary_zh: 尽管混合专家（MoE）模型因以适中计算成本扩展大语言模型而被广泛采用，但在资源受限和带宽有限的边缘基础设施上部署MoE推理仍具挑战。现有分布式MoE服务方法主要依赖精确的专家放置、缓存、复制或通信调度，而忽略了专家之间的功能相似性，这为减少跨服务器令牌传输提供了机会。为此，本文提出了OrderMoE，一种利用专家相似性来优化分布式边缘MoE推理的方法，旨在降低通信开销并提升推理效率。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2607.17154v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Although mixture-of-experts, MoE, models have been increasingly adopted to scale large language models with moderate computation cost, it remains challenging to deploy MoE inference over resource-constrained and bandwidth-limited edge infrastructures. Existing distributed MoE serving methods mainly rely on exact expert placement, caching, replication, or communication scheduling, while overlooking the functional similarity among experts, which provides an opportunity to reduce cross-server token transmission. Therefore, this paper introduces a…
items.why_zh: OrderMoE通过利用专家相似性优化通信，使得在资源受限的边缘设备上高效部署MoE模型成为可能。
items.why_en: OrderMoE enables efficient deployment of MoE models on resource-constrained edge devices by exploiting expert similarity to reduce communication.

items.title_zh: 语义色彩自然度破坏器：通过内容感知色彩先验防止非法着色
items.title_en: Semantic Color Naturalness Breaker: Preventing Illegitimate Colorization via Content-Aware Color Priors
items.summary_zh: 自动图像着色技术使得灰度媒体（如漫画页面和档案照片）的大规模低成本再利用成为可能，但也导致了未经授权的使用和再分发。一旦灰度内容在网上发布，任何人都可以使用现成模型将其转化为未经授权的彩色衍生作品，因此需要在发布时提供主动的内容侧保护。本文在“不可着色示例”的基础上，向发布的灰度图像添加不可察觉的扰动，以降低非法着色的质量。该方法通过内容感知色彩先验，确保扰动针对特定内容，从而有效阻止自动着色模型生成自然色彩，同时保持人眼视觉质量。这项工作为保护灰度内容的版权提供了新的技术手段。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2607.17610v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Automatic image colorization enables large-scale and low-cost reuse of grayscale media (e.g., manga panels and archival photographs), facilitating unauthorized reuse and redistribution. Once released online, grayscale content can be readily turned into unauthorized colorized derivatives using off-the-shelf models, creating a practical need for proactive, content-side protection at publication time. Building on Uncolorable Examples (UE), which add imperceptible perturbations to released grayscale images to degrade unauthorized colorization, we p…
items.why_zh: 该研究为灰度内容的版权保护提供了主动防御技术，防止未经授权的自动着色。
items.why_en: This research provides proactive defense against unauthorized automatic colorization, protecting copyright of grayscale content.

items.title_zh: 神经网络状态空间模型的在线学习研究
items.title_en: Online learning of neural state-space models
items.summary_zh: arXiv上的一篇论文探讨了基于编码器的神经网络状态空间（ANN-SS）模型的在线学习方法。传统上，这些模型在离线设置中通过从过去输入输出数据估计初始状态来实现最先进性能，但在线学习尚未充分探索。本文提出了一种批量学习流程和直接递归识别算法，用于子空间编码器基于的ANN-SS模型，为在线系统识别提供了新途径。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2607.17614v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Recent advances in deep-learning-based nonlinear system identification have led to encoder-based estimation of neural state-space (ANN-SS) models that achieve state-of-the-art performance in offline settings by estimating initial model states from past input-output data. These methods are typically used in multiple-shooting-based offline identification, and online learning of these models remains largely unexplored. This paper presents a batch-wise learning pipeline and a direct recursive identification algorithm for subspace encoder-based ANN-…
items.why_zh: 该研究填补了神经网络状态空间模型在线学习的空白，对实时系统识别和自适应控制具有重要价值。
items.why_en: This research fills a gap in online learning for neural state-space models, with significant implications for real-time system identification and adaptive control.

items.title_zh: SciForma：科学图表的结构忠实生成
items.title_en: SciForma: Structure-Faithful Generation of Scientific Diagrams
items.summary_zh: 结构保真度对于科学方法论图表至关重要。为了传达研究逻辑，这些图表必须忠实地呈现组件、方向关系和文本注释。由于单个错误（如箭头反向或方程不可读）可能使整个图形无效，结构保真度本质上是合取的：一个轴上的正确性无法补偿另一个轴上的失败。当前的开源模型无法满足这一标准。监督微调可以学习合理的布局，但无法可靠地生成精确的结构。本文提出SciForma，一种专门设计用于生成结构忠实科学图表的方法。它通过结合布局生成和结构约束，确保生成的图表在组件、关系和注释方面完全正确。实验表明，SciForma在结构保真度上显著优于现有模型，为科学交流提供了可靠的工具。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2607.18091v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Structural fidelity is essential to scientific methodology diagrams. To communicate research logic, these diagrams must faithfully render components, directional relations, and textual annotations. Since a single error, such as a reversed arrow or an unreadable equation, can invalidate the entire figure, structural fidelity is inherently conjunctive: correctness on one axis cannot compensate for failure on another. Current open-source models fail to satisfy this criterion. Supervised fine-tuning (SFT) learns plausible layouts but cannot reliabl…
items.why_zh: 该研究解决了科学图表生成中结构保真度的关键问题，对学术交流和出版具有重要意义。
items.why_en: This work addresses the critical issue of structural fidelity in scientific diagram generation, important for academic communication and publishing.

items.title_zh: 通过ATLAS揭示跨异构环境的不变和可迁移潜在因子
items.title_en: Unveiling Invariant and Transferable Latent Factors Across Heterogeneous Environments via ATLAS
items.summary_zh: 本文考虑一个多环境因子模型，其中高维协变量从异构环境中收集，且部分环境中有辅助标签可用。协变量的联合分布可能因环境而异，而潜在结构被分解为具有共享载荷的不变因子和具有环境特定载荷的异构因子。这种模型受到迁移学习和潜在因子回归的启发，旨在寻找稳定的低维表示，这些表示在不同环境中保持一致性，从而支持跨域泛化。ATLAS方法通过同时估计不变和异构因子，能够从有标签环境中学习可迁移的表示，并将其应用于无标签环境。实验证明，该方法在多个迁移学习任务中优于现有方法，特别是在环境差异显著时。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2607.18209v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: This paper considers a multi-environment factor model in which high-dimensional covariates are collected from heterogeneous environments, with auxiliary labels available in a subset of these environments. The joint distribution of the covariates may vary across environments, whereas the latent structure is decomposed into invariant factors with shared loadings and heterogeneous factors with environment-specific loadings. Such a model is motivated by transfer learning and latent factor regression, where one seeks stable low-dimensional represent…
items.why_zh: 该研究为跨环境迁移学习提供了稳定的低维表示方法，对领域适应和泛化有重要价值。
items.why_en: This research provides stable low-dimensional representations for cross-environment transfer learning, valuable for domain adaptation and generalization.

items.title_zh: Patch Policy：通过密集视觉表示实现高效具身控制
items.title_en: Patch Policy: Efficient Embodied Control via Dense Visual Representations
items.summary_zh: 来自Vision Transformers的预训练密集视觉特征强大但尚未在机器人学习中得到充分利用。现代机器人策略要么将每个观察压缩为单个全局标记，要么依赖从头训练的视觉骨干，牺牲了细粒度的空间细节和大规模视觉预训练的好处。虽然存在一些策略确实操作于密集补丁特征（如大型视觉-语言-动作模型），但它们往往沉重且缓慢，继承了十亿参数模型的全部成本。本文提出Patch Policy，一种轻量级策略，它利用预训练的ViT密集补丁特征，同时保持高效推理。通过仅使用补丁级特征和简单的MLP，Patch Policy在多个机器人操控任务上实现了与大型VLA模型相当的性能，但计算成本显著降低。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2607.18236v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Pretrained dense visual features from Vision Transformers (ViTs) are powerful yet have been underutilized in robot learning. Modern robot policies either compress each observation into a single global token, or rely on visual backbones trained from scratch, sacrificing both fine-grained spatial detail and the benefits of large-scale visual pre-training. While there exist policies that do operate on dense patch features like large vision-language-action models (VLAs), they tend to be heavy and slow, inheriting the full cost of a billion-paramete…
items.why_zh: 该研究使机器人策略能够高效利用预训练视觉特征，推动具身智能的实用化。
items.why_en: This work enables robot policies to efficiently leverage pretrained visual features, advancing practical embodied intelligence.

items.title_zh: BADTV：揭示第三方任务向量中的后门威胁
items.title_en: BADTV: Unveiling Backdoor Threats in Third-Party Task Vectors
items.summary_zh: 大规模预训练模型中的任务算术使得无需大量重新训练即可灵活适应各种下游任务。通过利用任务向量，用户可以通过简单的算术运算（如加法和减法）进行模块化更新。然而，这种灵活性带来了新的安全挑战。本文研究了任务向量如何易受后门攻击，揭示了恶意行为者如何利用它们破坏模型完整性。通过创建不对称设计的复合后门，攻击者可以在任务向量中植入后门，使得模型在特定输入下产生恶意行为，同时保持正常性能。实验表明，这种攻击难以检测，且对多种模型和任务有效。该工作强调了在任务向量共享和重用中需要安全验证机制。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2501.02373v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Task arithmetic in large-scale pre-trained models enables agile adaptation to diverse downstream tasks without extensive retraining. By leveraging task vectors (TVs), users can perform modular updates through simple arithmetic operations like addition and subtraction. Yet, this flexibility presents new security challenges. In this paper, we investigate how TVs are vulnerable to backdoor attacks, revealing how malicious actors can exploit them to compromise model integrity. By creating composite backdoors that are designed asymmetrically, we i…
items.why_zh: 该研究揭示了任务向量共享中的安全漏洞，对预训练模型生态系统的安全至关重要。
items.why_en: This research uncovers security vulnerabilities in task vector sharing, critical for the safety of the pretrained model ecosystem.

items.title_zh: 无遗忘的视听连续测试时适应
items.title_en: Audio-Visual Continual Test-Time Adaptation without Forgetting
items.summary_zh: 视听连续测试时适应涉及在测试时持续适应源视听模型，以适应未标记的非平稳域，其中任一或两种模态可能发生分布偏移，这阻碍了在线跨模态学习，最终导致准确性下降。虽然先前的工作已经解决了这个问题，但我们发现最先进的方法遭受灾难性遗忘，由于测试时的持续参数更新，模型性能甚至下降到低于源模型。本文首先分析了遗忘的原因，然后提出了一种新方法，通过引入记忆重放和正则化技术，在适应新域的同时保留旧域的知识。该方法在多个视听数据集上实现了持续适应，且没有显著的遗忘，性能优于现有方法。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2602.18528v4 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Audio-visual continual test-time adaptation involves continually adapting a source audio-visual model at test-time, to unlabeled non-stationary domains, where either or both modalities can be distributionally shifted, which hampers online cross-modal learning and eventually leads to poor accuracy. While previous works have tackled this problem, we find that SOTA methods suffer from catastrophic forgetting where the model's performance drops well below even the source model due to continual parameter updates at test-time. In this work, we firs…
items.why_zh: 该研究解决了视听模型在连续测试时适应中的灾难性遗忘问题，对实际部署至关重要。
items.why_en: This work solves catastrophic forgetting in audio-visual continual test-time adaptation, crucial for real-world deployment.

items.title_zh: 正确的知识，错误的答案：开放权重语言模型中的参数时间冲突特征
items.title_en: Right Knowledge, Wrong Answer: Characterizing Parametric Temporal Conflict in Open-Weight Language Models
items.summary_zh: 语言模型可能同时编码过时的事实及其新替代。我们引入了参数时间冲突，其中较新的事实存在且可恢复，但默认前向传播偏好过时的事实。我们发布了一个确定性验证的基准，包含8,746个维基数据职位持有者过渡，并评估了三个系列的四个开放权重语言模型。日期前缀提示在61-81%的PTC案例中恢复了较新的事实。激活修补在72-85%的案例中翻转了预测，并将偏好定位到特定层。该工作揭示了语言模型中事实知识的时间动态，并提供了检测和纠正过时事实的方法。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.20959v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Language models may encode both outdated facts and their newer replacements. We introduce Parametric Temporal Conflict (PTC), where the newer fact is present and recoverable, but the default forward pass prefers the outdated one. We release a deterministically verified benchmark of 8,746 Wikidata position-holder transitions and evaluate four open-weight language models across three families. A date-prefix prompt recovers the newer fact in 61-81% of PTC cases. Activation patching flips predictions in 72-85% of cases and localizes the preferenc…
items.why_zh: 该研究揭示了语言模型中事实知识的时间冲突问题，对模型更新和事实准确性至关重要。
items.why_en: This research reveals temporal conflicts in factual knowledge within language models, critical for model updating and factual accuracy.

items.title_zh: 非线性赌博机：重尾噪声下的广义线性赌博机问题
items.title_en: Nonlinear Bandit
items.summary_zh: 该论文研究了重尾噪声下的广义线性赌博机（GLB）问题。重尾分布广泛存在于个性化推荐、金融市场和医疗等实际应用中。基于在线镜像下降（OMD）方法，作者提出了一种名为EHM的算法，该算法扩展了自适应Huber损失方法，并采用单次更新，每轮计算复杂度为O(1)，与时间范围T无关。该算法能够有效处理重尾噪声，为相关应用提供了理论保证。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2607.07304v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: In this paper we first study the problem of generalized linear bandit (GLB) under heavy-tailed noise. The characteristics of heavy-tailed distributions are widely observed in real-world applications such as personalized recommendation, financial markets, and medical treatments. Based on the online mirror descent (OMD) method, we propose an algorithm EHM that extends the adaptive Huber loss method (Wang et al., 2025) with one-pass update ($\mathcal{O}(1)$ computational complexity with respect to current round $t$ and the time horizon $T$), whi…
items.why_zh: 该研究为处理实际应用中常见的重尾噪声提供了高效算法，拓展了赌博机理论的应用范围。
items.why_en: This work provides an efficient algorithm for heavy-tailed noise, expanding the applicability of bandit theory in real-world scenarios.

items.title_zh: 模型误设定下的动态决策：一种随机稳定性方法
items.title_en: Dynamic Decision-Making under Model Misspecification: A Stochastic Stability Approach
items.summary_zh: 该论文研究了当模型类别被误设定时，贝叶斯强化学习算法——汤普森采样（TS）的行为和性能。作者首先对误设定的两臂高斯赌博机中后验演化的动态进行了完整分类，识别出不同区域。该工作揭示了模型误设定对动态决策的影响，为理解算法在不确定性环境中的鲁棒性提供了新视角。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2602.17086v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Dynamic decision-making under model uncertainty is central to many economic environments, yet existing bandit and reinforcement learning algorithms rely on the assumption of correct model specification. This paper studies the behavior and performance of one of the most commonly used Bayesian reinforcement learning algorithms, Thompson Sampling (TS), when the model class is misspecified. We first provide a complete dynamic classification of posterior evolution in a misspecified two-armed Gaussian bandit, identifying distinct regimes: cor…
items.why_zh: 该研究挑战了强化学习算法依赖正确模型设定的假设，对实际应用中的模型鲁棒性具有重要意义。
items.why_en: This work challenges the assumption of correct model specification in reinforcement learning, highlighting robustness issues in real-world applications.

items.title_zh: 重磅收购落地 “全球大模型第一股”智谱盘中股价大涨
items.title_en: Major Acquisition Completed: Zhipu AI's Stock Surges
items.summary_zh: 重磅收购落地 “全球大模型第一股”智谱盘中股价大涨 证券时报
items.summary_en: Zhipu AI completed a major acquisition, leading to a significant surge in its stock price. The company, known as the 'first global large model stock,' strengthens its AI position.
items.why_zh: 此次收购标志着智谱在AI领域的战略扩张，对市场格局产生重要影响。
items.why_en: This acquisition marks Zhipu AI's strategic expansion, significantly impacting the market landscape.

items.title_zh: 腾讯混元发布科学发现智能体 Hyra，能够递归自我改进
items.title_en: Tencent Hunyuan Launches Recursively Self-Improving Agent Hyra-1.0
items.summary_zh: IT之家 7 月 21 日消息，腾讯混元今日推出 Hyra-1.0 ，这是 Hyra（Hunyuan Research Agent）的首个版本：一个能够递归自我改进、专为性能导向的研究与工程任务打造的智能体。 腾讯表示，除了公开基准，它还能在产品系统里，在真实的 AI 研发流水线上，在自然科学研究乃至工业场景里学习和进化。 过去一年，递归自我改进（RSI）与自动化研究成为 AI 领域最活跃的前沿问题之一。 Google DeepMind 的 AlphaEvolve 只用 48 次标量乘法就完成了 4×4 复数矩阵相乘。Together AI 让一群智能体在开放环境中协作，把 11 维 kissing number 的已知下界从 593 推进到 604。Andrej Karpathy 的 autoresearch 展示了一套精简的循环，让模型训练研究自主运转。 此后，一批进化型系统接连涌现：智能体正在跨越封闭的基准测试，在开放的科学发现中超越人类。 腾讯混元 Hyra 的 Harness 设计原则遵循 The Bitter Lesson：框架尽量轻量简单，智能体的动作空间尽量广阔。给定任务描述，Hyra 持续运行一个循环：基于历史经验探索提出更好的 solution。历史经验包含过去 solution 运行的日志、评估器反馈、solution 的源代码等。循环直到 Agent 主动结…
items.summary_en: Tencent Hunyuan launched Hyra-1.0, a recursively self-improving agent for research and engineering tasks. It operates in a continuous loop, exploring better solutions based on historical experience, and can learn in real-world AI pipelines and scientific research. This release highlights the growing trend of agents moving beyond benchmarks to open scientific discovery.
items.why_zh: 递归自我改进是AI前沿方向，Hyra展示了智能体在真实场景中自主进化的能力，可能加速AI研发效率。
items.why_en: Recursive self-improvement is a frontier in AI, and Hyra demonstrates agents' ability to autonomously evolve in real-world scenarios, potentially accelerating AI R&D efficiency.

items.title_zh: “瑞莱智慧”完成数亿元B轮融资
items.title_en: AI Security Firm RealAI Closes Hundreds of Millions in Series B Funding
items.summary_zh: 36氪获悉，日前，AI安全技术公司“瑞莱智慧”（RealAI）连续完成合计数亿元规模的B1轮和B2轮融资，投资方包括星连资本、招商局集团旗下数字贸易基金、卓源亚洲、卓源资本、福迪创投、水木清华校友种子基金等。本轮融资将重点用于安全可信大模型系统的持续研发与产业落地。
items.summary_en: RealAI, an AI security company, completed multiple Series B rounds totaling hundreds of millions of RMB. Investors include Xinglian Capital, China Merchants Group's digital trade fund, and others. The funds will be used for R&D and deployment of secure and trustworthy large model systems.
items.why_zh: AI安全是行业刚需，RealAI的融资表明市场对可信AI技术的重视和投入持续增长。
items.why_en: AI security is a critical need; RealAI's funding reflects growing market attention and investment in trustworthy AI technologies.

items.title_zh: Copilot想引入Kimi K3！微软却陷两难：省40亿元还是惹怒特朗普
items.title_en: Microsoft Copilot Weighs Introducing Kimi K3, Faces Dilemma of Cost vs. Politics
items.summary_zh: Copilot想引入Kimi K3！微软却陷两难：省40亿元还是惹怒特朗普 新浪网
items.summary_en: Microsoft's Copilot is considering adopting Kimi K3, which could save about $4 billion but risks angering the Trump administration due to US-China tech tensions. Microsoft faces a dilemma between cost savings and political backlash.
items.why_zh: 该事件凸显AI供应链中商业利益与地缘政治的冲突，可能影响全球AI模型合作格局。
items.why_en: This highlights the conflict between commercial interests and geopolitics in AI supply chains, potentially reshaping global AI model collaborations.

items.title_zh: 消息称阿里将推“千问办公”：合并旗下三款智能体，钉钉新任 CEO 陈宇森负责
items.title_en: Alibaba to Launch 'Qianwen Office', Merging Three Agents Under New DingTalk CEO
items.summary_zh: IT之家 7 月 21 日消息，《财经》杂志今天（21 日）上午发布消息称，阿里将推出千问办公，且已经整合 QoderWork、悟空、MuleRun 这三款智能体产品。 据悉，千问办公将是阿里面向 Agent 办公市场的“拳头产品”，由钉钉新任 CEO 陈宇森负责。今年 6 月，钉钉创始人、原 CEO 陈航卸任，陈宇森随后接棒。 消息称阿里今年 7 月初将旗下上述 3 款智能体产品交给陈宇森负责整合。产品层面，千问办公将以 QoderWork 为基础，原因在于悟空 长期处于半成品状态 、MuleRun 此前 主要面向海外市场 ，QoderWork 是阿里目前“用户规模最大、市场口碑最好”的智能体产品。 了解钉钉的人士称，将三者整合起来 是个难题 ，不仅要保障现有用户权益，还有来自组织层面的更大挑战，三款产品背后都有各自的团队。 也有接近钉钉的人士坦言“手心手背都是肉”，其认为 整合产品易，整合人心难 。凝聚团队和重新配置资源，才是真正困难的部分。 不仅如此，除了整合 QoderWork、悟空、MuleRun，如何将千问办公和钉钉深度整合是另一个难题。钉钉在制造、政务、教育，以及传统行业的中小企业市场拥有庞大的客户群体。报道提到，这些业务看起来是“上一个时代的产品”，但却是贡献现金流的基本盘。 据IT之家此前报道，陈宇森在上任一周后发出了第一封全员信，宣布对组织进行大调整。 阿里巴巴…
items.summary_en: Alibaba plans to launch 'Qianwen Office', merging three agent products (QoderWork, Wukong, MuleRun) under new DingTalk CEO Chen Yusen. The integration faces organizational challenges and must align with DingTalk's existing business, which is a key cash flow generator.
items.why_zh: 此举显示阿里加码AI办公市场，但整合难度大，成败将影响其Agent战略和钉钉生态。
items.why_en: This move signals Alibaba's push into the AI office market, but integration challenges will determine the success of its agent strategy and DingTalk ecosystem.

items.title_zh: 融资、扩招、上市 DeepSeek被潮水推着走
items.title_en: DeepSeek Rides the Wave: Funding, Hiring, IPO Rumors Swirl
items.summary_zh: 融资、扩招、上市 DeepSeek被潮水推着走 中华网财经
items.summary_en: DeepSeek is reportedly pursuing funding, expanding hiring, and facing IPO rumors amid the AI boom. The company focuses on large model development and is accelerating growth despite intense competition.
items.why_zh: DeepSeek的动态反映了中国AI初创企业的普遍发展路径和面临的资本与市场压力。
items.why_en: DeepSeek's moves reflect the typical growth path and market pressures faced by Chinese AI startups.

items.title_zh: 盘中涨超20%！智谱落地1GW级国产AI算力数据中心，完成收购中科加禾
items.title_en: Zhipu Surges Over 20% Intraday, Deploys 1GW Domestic AI Computing Center and Acquires Zhongke Jiahe
items.summary_zh: 盘中涨超20%！智谱落地1GW级国产AI算力数据中心，完成收购中科加禾 thepaper.cn
items.summary_en: Zhipu's stock surged over 20% intraday after announcing the deployment of a 1GW domestic AI computing center and the acquisition of Zhongke Jiahe. The move strengthens its domestic AI infrastructure and chip optimization capabilities, boosting market confidence.
items.why_zh: 这是国产AI算力领域的重要进展，显示智谱在自主可控算力上的战略布局，对国内大模型生态具有示范意义。
items.why_en: This marks a significant step in domestic AI computing, showcasing Zhipu's strategic push for self-reliant infrastructure, with implications for China's AI ecosystem.

items.title_zh: Kimi K3发布后，最慌的不是英伟达
items.title_en: After Kimi K3 Launch, Nvidia Is Not the Most Worried
items.summary_zh: Kimi K3发布后，最慌的不是英伟达 搜狐网
items.summary_en: The launch of Kimi K3 by Moonshot AI raises concerns more for domestic AI chip makers than Nvidia, as its efficiency improvements may reduce reliance on high-end GPUs, intensifying competition in China's AI sector.
items.why_zh: Kimi K3的发布可能改变国内AI芯片需求格局，对国产芯片厂商构成挑战，同时加剧大模型市场竞争。
items.why_en: Kimi K3's launch could shift demand for domestic AI chips and intensify competition among Chinese AI model developers.

items.title_zh: Gartner 预测：全球 AI 模型和平台市场 2026 年将增长 63.4%，达 640 亿美元
items.title_en: Gartner Forecasts Global AI Model and Platform Market to Reach $64 Billion by 2026
items.summary_zh: IT之家 7 月 21 日消息，Gartner 美国当地时间本月 20 日发文指出， 全球终端用户 2026 年将在 AI 模型和平台上支出 642.52 亿美元 （IT之家注：现汇率约合 4355.05 亿元人民币） ，相较去年增长 63.4%，其中生成式 AI 模型投资增幅达 117%、AI 平台支出则增长 36.9%。 2025 支出 2026 支出 增幅 基础 GenAI 模型 114.38 233.56 104.2% DSLM 和专用 GenAI 模型 15.83 49.10 210.0% AI 应用开发平台 68.85 95.41 38.6% 数据科学和机器学习 AI 平台 194.05 264.44 36.3% 总体 393.11 642.52 63.4% IT之家注：支出金额单位为亿美元，DSLM 即特定领域语言模型 Gartner 高级首席研究分析师 Arunasree Cheparthi 表示： 企业人工智能预算正受到更严格的审查， 人们越来越关注使用效率、成本控制和可衡量的结果 。支出正转向那些能够在成本、延迟、性能和可靠性方面展现明显价值的供应商。 这使得那些将评估、成本透明度和使用情况跟踪嵌入客户工作流程的供应商更具优势，从而更容易管理和优化人工智能的使用。然而，随着支出越来越以使用量为导向，供应商面临着越来越大的压力，需要证明其真正被采用、持续使用并拥有…
items.summary_en: Gartner forecasts global AI model and platform spending to reach $64.3 billion in 2026, up 63.4% from 2025. GenAI model investment will grow 117%, while DSLM spending surges 210%. Enterprises demand cost efficiency and measurable results.
items.why_zh: 该预测表明AI市场高速增长，但供应商面临证明价值和控制成本的压力，行业竞争将加剧。
items.why_en: The forecast indicates rapid AI market growth, but vendors face pressure to demonstrate value and control costs, intensifying competition.

items.title_zh: 马斯克称其2万亿新模型“可能超越Kimi”，月之暗面回应：“欢迎马斯克加入“2万亿+俱乐部”
items.title_en: Musk Claims New Model May Surpass Kimi; Moonshot AI Welcomes Him to '2 Trillion+ Club'
items.summary_zh: 马斯克称其2万亿新模型“可能超越Kimi”，月之暗面回应：“欢迎马斯克加入“2万亿+俱乐部” 手机网易网
items.summary_en: Elon Musk claimed his new model (possibly from xAI) with $2 trillion training cost may surpass Kimi. Moonshot AI responded welcoming him to the '2 trillion+ club', implying their model also reached that scale. This highlights the race for ultra-large models.
items.why_zh: 这场隔空较量反映了AI行业对模型规模和性能的极致追求，以及中美AI公司的竞争态势。
items.why_en: This exchange reflects the AI industry's extreme pursuit of model scale and performance, and the competitive dynamics between US and Chinese AI companies.

items.title_zh: 蚂蚁国际完成约12亿美元A轮融资，蚂蚁集团、阿里集团等参与
items.title_en: Ant International Closes ~$1.2B Series A to Accelerate AI and Global Expansion
items.summary_zh: 36氪获悉，蚂蚁国际今日宣布已完成A轮融资。蚂蚁集团、以及包括阿里巴巴在内的一些现有股东和多家国际投资机构参与了本轮融资。本轮融资金额约12亿美元，将用于扩展全球业务，加速AI等前沿技术投入，拓宽跨境支付、全球账户等普惠金融科技服务，助力全球商家实现增长。
items.summary_en: Ant International closed a ~$1.2 billion Series A round from Ant Group, Alibaba, and other investors. Funds will fuel global expansion, AI investment, and cross-border payment services for merchants worldwide.
items.why_zh: 蚂蚁国际的大额融资表明其全球化战略加速，AI技术投入将增强其在跨境金融领域的竞争力。
items.why_en: Ant International's large funding round signals accelerated globalization, with AI investment boosting its competitiveness in cross-border finance.
